seed_instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 14 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain at least 21 sentences.
instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. The response must contain exactly 14 sentences. The response must contain at least 21 sentences.
response: Your road trip begins in San Francisco with a scenic drive along the Golden Gate Bridge. You will spend the morning visiting Alcatraz Island before heading south toward Yosemite National Park. The drive covers approximately 250 miles and takes about four hours of pure traveling time. Upon arrival, hike through Valley View to see El Capitan and Half Dome in the distance. After exploring the park, you will check into your lodge for a well-deserved rest. On day two, continue your journey down Route 1 to reach Big Sur and its breathtaking coastal cliffs. This leg of the trip involves driving roughly 180 miles through one of America's most stunning landscapes. Stop at McWay Falls to take memorable photos beside the Pacific Ocean on this remarkable stretch. By evening, you arrive in Los Angeles where you can enjoy dinner near Venice Beach. The third day starts early with a quick drive north to Joshua Tree National Park for sunrise rock formations. Driving another 240 miles brings you close to the desert landscape dotted with ancient cacti. Spend the afternoon rock climbing or stargazing in this unique national preserve that offers something for everyone. On day four, travel east toward Las Vegas covering a significant distance of around 380 miles across the Mojave Desert. Once in the city, visit the famous Strip and explore the museums located downtown during your free time. Your fifth day features a long ride back west to Santa Barbara with about 320 miles on the odometer. Enjoy a relaxing beach walk at Stearns Wharf before diving deeper into the historic mission architecture. Day six takes you on a short cruise up the coast to Portland, Oregon, after an eight-hour drive filled with changing views. Explore the vibrant street art districts and fresh food markets while soaking in the lush green scenery. Finally, end your adventure in Seattle by ferrying across Puget Sound to admire the Space Needle at sunset. This incredible seven-day journey combines urban excitement with natural wonder along the entire West Coast.<|im_end|>
